name: file
description: A file as a Body. A directory is a Body whose surface includes [list, read, write, execute]. Navigating the filesystem is traversing the world graph.

fields.name: object_id
fields.description: Entity ID of this file body

fields.name: content_id
fields.description: IPFS CID or content hash for retrieval

fields.name: executable
fields.description: Whether this file can be run as a program
